SKILLS_PROG_AI_DESC: Focused on Python, C++ and AI frameworks.
ARTICLE_COBEM_TITLE: TABULAR PRIOR-DATA FITTED NETWORK FOR STRUCTURAL DAMAGE PREDICTION
ARTICLE_COBEM_DESC: Evaluation of the TabPFN algorithm for structural damage prediction. Results demonstrate excellent accuracy without hyperparameter tuning, outperforming traditional models with strong potential for structural health monitoring.
UTC_DEGREE: Ingénieur en génie informatique spécialisé en IA
HOME_SUBTITLE: Building AI and Automation solutions focused on efficiency and real-world integration.
ABOUT ME:
Computer Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Automation. My approach bridges the technical precision of software with the physical constraints of hardware, delivering solutions that are not only theoretically sound but operationally efficient.

At 18, I founded and managed my own clothing brand — an experience that sharpened my understanding of financial viability, resource allocation, and strategic decision-making. After determining that the opportunity cost outweighed the immediate returns, I redirected my focus toward technical education. Today, I channel that same analytical mindset into building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.

ARTICLES_TEXT: Academic and technical publications I have contributed to.
CARD-TEXT-SEARCH-ENGINE: NLP-powered information retrieval engine built from scratch in Python. Features a Glassmorphism web dashboard, TF-IDF ranking, spell-checker, and boolean metadata search.
CARD-TEXT-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system integrating large language models with custom document retrieval pipelines for context-aware AI responses.
CARD-TEXT-V2: Personal portfolio built with Angular 15, featuring dynamic i18n translation across 9 languages and modern dark/light theming.
PORTFOLIO-SECTION-SUBTITLE: A curated selection of projects I have designed and built.
CARD-LONG-1: A classic personal portfolio website showcasing early work, skills, and contact information. Built with HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap for styling, and hosted on Netlify.
CARD-LONG-V2: The second iteration of my personal portfolio. Built with Angular 15, utilizing TypeScript, and featuring a custom translation system (i18n) supporting 9 languages. It includes smooth spring animations, light/dark mode support, and an Apple-inspired minimalist design system.
CARD-LONG-SEARCH-ENGINE: A custom NLP-powered information retrieval engine built from scratch. It features TF-IDF term weighting for document ranking, a spelling corrector based on edit distance, and boolean metadata filters. The web interface is designed with a premium Glassmorphism look using Python and Flask.
CARD-LONG-RAG: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that integrates modern large language models (LLMs) with specialized vector databases and document loaders (using LangChain) to provide precise, context-aware answers based on private document stores.
